indicators.name: large open space
indicators.rationale: The open layout makes it difficult to find a quiet spot away from distractions.

indicators.name: low ceilings
indicators.rationale: Low ceilings can make the space feel cramped and claustrophobic.

indicators.name: lack of dedicated work surfaces
indicators.rationale: There are no flat surfaces suitable for placing a laptop or other work tools.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: There are no chairs designed for prolonged sitting, which is essential for comfort and posture.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The large open space and low ceilings create a challenging environment for finding a quiet spot and maintaining comfort. There are no dedicated work surfaces or ergonomic seating, which are crucial for extended computer work.
